regional_cost_note: Demolition contractors in Hamilton typically charge $3,500–$14,000 for an internal strip-out and $16,000–$40,000+ for a full house demolition. Asbestos removal is priced separately at $85–$220/m². Waikato rates are generally 10–15% below Auckland for most trades. Asbestos testing is mandatory before any demolition work on pre-1990 buildings.
